Handles status changes for Bluetooth pairing in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a C source file that includes a header file for a Bluetooth Pebble pairing service. It defines a function [`bt_driver_pebble_pairing_service_handle_status_change`](<#bt_driver_pebble_pairing_service_handle_status_change>) which takes a pointer to a `GAPLEConnection` structure as an argument. The function is intended to handle status changes in a Bluetooth connection, although its body is currently empty, indicating that the implementation is not yet complete. The file is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0, as indicated by the comment block at the beginning.
